fields.name: stampPassword
fields.comment: Optional stamp password; null if the stamp is not password-protected.

fields.name: pageNumber
fields.comment: Zero-based index of the page within the section to stamp (0 = first page).

fields.name: sectionNumber
fields.comment: Zero-based index of the document section to stamp (0 = first section; a document may have multiple sections).

fields.name: layer
fields.comment: Annotation layer the stamp is written to, 1–5 (DocuWare provides five independent layers).
